title: MCP Tool Index
description: Maps every MCP server tool to tags (for categorical filtering) and intent (for semantic matching). Lives at .ai-badger/mcp-tools.yaml in scaffolded projects.

version.description: Index format version (not ai-badger framework version).

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last index generation.

name.description: MCP server name as it appears in hermes mcp list.

url.description: MCP server endpoint URL (for HTTP/SSE servers).

tags.description: Category tags from the closed taxonomy in features/common/mcp-tags.json.

intent.description: Human-readable one-sentence description of what the tool accomplishes. Used for semantic matching.

status.description: Set to 'removed' when the MCP server no longer exposes this tool (preserves manual tags for later re-addition).
